conditions.critical_condition_basis: disappearance of molar mass dependence of retention time
conditions.evidence_text: The disappearance of the molar mass dependence of the retention time, corresponding to the critical conditions, was achieved at a composition of the mobile phase of acetonitrile—water (43:57, v/v); see Fig. 1.
conditions.notes: Condition established using PEO calibration standards on a Macherey-Nagel 5C18 column. Used to separate a triblock polymer HO(EO)n(PO)m(EO)nOH based on the PPO block length.
conditions.physical_address: Deutsches Kunststoff-Institut, Schlossgartenstrasse 6, W-6100 Darmstadt, Germany
